title: Keep routes clear of endpoint component borders
description: Reject routed segments that run parallel within 8px of their own source or target component border after the required normal endpoint stub.
decision_notes: The source and target normal endpoint segments remain allowed because they must cross the component boundary perpendicularly.
Subsequent segments are rejected when they are less than 8px from a parallel endpoint border and begin within 20px of that component, preventing border-extension artifacts.
The supplied AOF governance graph is represented by a focused regression case covering the Orchestrator-to-Runtime failure shape.
verification: Browser smoke on http://127.0.0.1:5173/: Orchestrator bottom border y=117.6 and routed horizontal segment y=160.4
